Boots of Superiority  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FEET
AC: 30
STR: +4 DEX: +4 STA: +4 CHA: +4 WIS: +4 INT: +4 AGI: +4
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
Focus: Affliction Efficiency III
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Boots of Superiority
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FEET
AC: 30
STR: +4 DEX: +4 STA: +4 CHA: +4 WIS: +4 INT: +4 AGI: +4
SV FIRE: +3 SV DISEASE: +3 SV COLD: +3 SV MAGIC: +3 SV POISON: +3
Focus: Affliction Efficiency III
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Chain 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Valero Forceblade
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 10:02:33
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Lendiniara the Keeper


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded December 23rd, 2022 by halfridge
Updated December 25th, 2022
Send a correction
Post Comment
Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2003 at 5:54 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591782049866
143 posts
As a wizard, I plan on trying to get a pair of these. The focus effect is great for soloing, which I do for xp and pp, but the 30ac is awesome. That is more ac than my chest slot an definetly worth a ton for when the mob decides to resist root/snare and starts beating on me. These boots are great for everyone, and should not limited to any one class.
▲ Page top
RE: Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2003 at 8:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361662060
196 posts
How is affliction efficiency useful to a wizard? You know its a 25% mana mitigation on DoTs, right? Otherwise fine...nice boots. Hope you get them.
▲ Page top
RE: Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2003 at 9:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591752592616
Scholar
21 posts
He is probably referring to bonds, which is the wizard SNARE spell.
▲ Page top
RE: Very Nice
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2003 at 4:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761991555
Scholar
300 posts
Just as an aside, since these are old posts, Affliction focus items no longer effect all duration-based spells. They now function ONLY with spells that do damage. However, if that spell also does something else, that's fine. For example, necro and SK snares are affected by Affliction items, since they include a duration-based damage component in addition to the snare.
▲ Page top
Got Mine
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2002 at 1:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255898091
View User Forum
20 posts
Poor Lendi.

Minding her own business when SoG shows up and ruins her whole day. She dropped 3 pairs of boots.
Spent 10dkp on em, well worth it. Love em already.

<p><left>

▲ Page top
WTF is with afliction Efiency 3
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2002 at 9:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592791723391
15 posts
yeah yeah my spelling sucks so dont bother flaming

anyways why the hell is there only two items in game with Affliction Efficiency 3 on them this which is a hard drop to get unless you are in a totally uber guild <which I am happy to say I am not I like my family orinated guild> and the other being droped only by gm or for sale for 35kp and no longer drops

I mean come on this is helpful to every necromancer out there that uses dots yet none of them can get this without a group of pure 56+'s on a goodsize raid?

Taurin Finloft
52 enc

kailor finloft
32 necro

ps yes I got affliction efficiency 2 stuff on him now but 32 in 3 days played tell you what I want
▲ Page top
RE: WTF is with afliction Efiency 3
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2002 at 1:26 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763587688
144 posts
Affliction efficiency also applies to slow, tash, mez and cripple type debuffs. Basically if it debuffs, it applies. Also decreases mana on dots 8)

Edited, Sat Dec 7 01:03:17 2002
▲ Page top
RE: WTF is with afliction Efiency 3
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2002 at 8:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775709720
78 posts
This site is not 100% up to date with items and their focus effects.
Casters Realm has a list with more items with Affliction Effiency III (4 items actually)

http://eq.crgaming.com/focus/
▲ Page top
RE: WTF is with afliction Efiency 3
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2002 at 1:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775630284
37 posts
There are 4 items listed however 1 doesnt drop anymore 2 are off ToV named dragons (this mob being the easiest of all 3 mobs taht drop AF3 items) and the amulet that drops off the last rhag in that cycle. and its crappy amulet also.
▲ Page top
new effect
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2002 at 1:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
Affliction haste III was added to this item. This decreases the cast time of DoTs up to level 60.
▲ Page top
RE: new effect
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2002 at 6:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769931608
4 posts
Affliction Efficiency III doesnt decrease the cast time, it decreases the mana (25% to be exact) of most DoTs
▲ Page top
Change
QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2002 at 1:38 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248159931
33 posts
The AC on these was changed to 30 AC, dropped on 3/22/02

QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 4:07 PM Rating: Decent

maybe sound stupid but how many monks would use these over barbed dragon if awarded them

RE: just wondering
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2001 at 1:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361254562
View User Forum
119 posts
I'd probably use them, but would certainly tighten up my wt restriction and just make it a major pain to stay under wt. I wouldn't seek to loot them at 5 wt, double barbed boots...which are heavy enough. Most monks would pass probably.
▲ Page top
change to these boots
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2001 at 8:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755390733
11 posts
These dropped last night along with the 25ac belt. The AC on these boots is now 30, not 20, which makes them a great addition for anybody. 30ac +stat bonuses AND saves...that is just amazing.
